headline: Consensus Shows Palantir's Revenue Shifting Toward Commercial Segment
summary: Palantir Technologies is shifting its growth engine from government contracts to commercial sector adoption, driven by its AI Platform.

raw.headline: Consensus Shows Palantir's Revenue Shifting Toward Commercial Segment

headline: Palantir (PLTR) Partners with Google Cloud to Integrate AIP and Foundry Platforms
summary: Palantir Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ:PLTR) is one of the best US stocks to buy and hold for the next 5 years. On June 4, Palantir partnered with Google Cloud to integrate its Foundry and AIP platforms with BigQuery, Gemini, and the Google Knowledge Catalog. Available via the Google Cloud Marketplace, this partnership enables two-way data federation […]

headline: The AI race is not over for Europe, says EU commissioner
summary: Ekaterina Zaharieva, the European Commissioner for Startups, Research and Innovation, says Europe is not yet out of the AI race, as she speaks to Karen Tso on the sidelines of Vivatech.

headline: Cathie Wood sells $8.7 million of tumbling AI stock
summary: Cathie Wood, head of Ark Investment Management, is known for making bold bets on disruptive tech companies. Yet Wood recently reduced one of her favorite investments, Palantir, after the stock fell roughly 28% year to date. In 2025, the flagship Ark Innovation ETF gained 35.49%, far outpacing the ...
